Is the fruit (or crop) developing without rot or damage?

Are there olive-green or dark spots on the leaves?
Do the apples have dark, scabby patches on them?
Are affected leaves dropping off early?
Are there 'frog-eye' shaped spots on the leaves?
Are parts of the apple turning brown and rotting while on the tree?
Are there dried up, black apples ('mummies') still attached to the branches?
Are there bright yellow or orange spots on the upper side of the leaves?
Are there small orange swellings or 'horns' under the leaves?
Have you seen rust-colored spots on the fruit?
Are there small, tan or grey spots on the leaves?
Do the spots have clear, distinct edges (rectangular shape)?
Are the lower leaves turning brown and drying up?
Are there powdery, reddish-brown spots (pustules) on both sides of the leaves?
Does the red powder rub off when you touch the spots?
Are the heavily covered leaves turning yellow or drying out?
Are there long, cigar-shaped grey or brown spots on the leaves?
Are the spots starting on the lower leaves and moving up?
Are whole leaves dying and turning grey?
Are the grapes turning brown, then black, hard, and shriveled?
Are there light brown, circular spots with dark edges on the leaves?
Are there tiny black dots inside the leaf spots?
Do the leaves have a 'tiger-stripe' pattern of yellow and brown?
Are the vines suddenly wilting or dying off?
Are there dark, tiny spots speckling the surface of the grapes?
Are there large, irregular brown spots drying out the leaf edges?
Are the affected leaves dropping off the vine earlier than normal?
Are the spots spreading quickly in wet weather?
Are there brown spots on the lower leaves that look like a target (rings inside)?
Is the leaf yellowing around the brown spots?
Are the stems showing dark, sunken spots?
Are there large, dark, water-soaked spots spreading quickly on the leaves?
Is there a white, fuzzy mold under the leaves in the morning or when wet?
Do the potatoes in the ground have hard, dark, reddish-brown spots under the skin?
Are there small, dark, water-soaked spots on the leaves?
Do the green tomatoes have raised, scabby dark spots on them?
Are the severely spotted leaves turning yellow and dropping?
Are there brown, target-like spots (concentric rings) on the oldest leaves first?
Is there a large yellow halo around the brown spots?
Are the spots moving from the bottom leaves to the top?
Are large sections of the leaves quickly turning brown and looking water-soaked?
Is there white fuzzy growth on the underside of the leaves when it is wet?
Are the tomatoes developing large, firm, dark brown greasy-looking spots?
Are there pale green or yellow spots on the top side of the older leaves?
Is there an olive-green or grey fuzzy mold directly under those yellow spots?
Are affected leaves curling and dying but staying on the plant?
Are there many small, circular spots with grey centers and dark borders on the lower leaves?
Can you see tiny black specks in the center of the spots?
Are the lower leaves turning yellow, dying, and dropping off heavily?
Do the leaves look speckled, stippled, or pale yellow?
Is there very fine, silken webbing visible under the leaves or between stems?
Do you see tiny, moving dots (mites) under the leaves when you look closely?
Are there dark brown spots with a lighter center on the leaves?
Are there sunken spots with rings developing on the tomatoes?
Are the leaves drying out and falling off quickly?
Do the leaves have a mottled pattern of light and dark green?
Are the leaves curled, wrinkled, or fern-like in shape?
Is the plant stunted or smaller than healthy plants?
Are the top leaves severely yellowing and curling upwards (cup-like)?
Is the plant very stunted, not growing tall?
Are the flowers dropping off without making tomatoes?
Are there small, dark, water-soaked spots on the leaves?
Do the peppers have raised, scabby brown spots?
Are the leaves turning yellow and dropping off the plant?
Are there irregular, purple or dark red spots on the leaves?
Do the spots lack a light center?
Do the edges of the leaves look brown and burned (scorched)?
Are there small, angular purple or dark spots on the leaves?
Do the spots dry out and fall out, leaving 'shot-holes' in the leaves?
Are there deep cracks or pitted dark spots on the peaches?
Do you see insects, caterpillars, or tiny bugs actively crawling on the plants?
Are there holes chewed in the leaves, stems, or fruit?
